name: vscode-dev-toolkit
description: An extensible collection of focused VS Code productivity toolkits.

vscodeDevToolkit.focusAutoHide.hideSideb.description: Auto-hide the primary (left) sidebar when focus returns to an editor.

vscodeDevToolkit.focusAutoHide.hidePanel.description: Auto-hide the bottom panel when focus returns to an editor.

vscodeDevToolkit.focusAutoHide.hideSecon.description: Auto-hide the secondary (right) sidebar when focus returns to an editor.

vscodeDevToolkit.focusAutoHide.hideActiv.description: Auto-hide the activity bar (left icon rail) when focus returns to an editor.

vscodeDevToolkit.focusAutoHide.hideStatu.description: Auto-hide the status bar when focus returns to an editor.

vscodeDevToolkit.focusAutoHide.debounceM.description: Delay in milliseconds before auto-hide commands run after editor focus changes. 0 = near-instant (next tick).

vscodeDevToolkit.notes.directory.description: Workspace-relative directory where daily note files are stored.

vscodeDevToolkit.statusBar.showFocusAuto.description: Show the Focus Auto-Hide toggle button in the status bar.

vscodeDevToolkit.statusBar.showViewToggl.description: Show individual view toggle buttons (Sidebar, Panel, Secondary Bar, Activity Bar, Status Bar) in the status bar.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
